hotel_name: Khách sạn Mekong Mỹ Tho (Mekong My Tho Hotel )

reviews.title: Staff behavior & service of receptionist very bad
reviews.text:
My reservation done & paid for the room already. When my family check-in at 9h30 am on 29 May 2018, the receptionist said that they don’t have an available room even they have our reservation from Agoda. The said that they blocked the room & Agoda unblock the room and sell the room for many guests included me. 
The hotel staff of Sales department come and suggested that We must cancel the reservation with Agoda and book a new room as a walk-in guest, with the reason is they not receive our accomodation from Agoda yet!!!
I don’t do their way & ask them must gave us a triple superior as our reservation, after 30mins, the receptionist decided to gave us a twin bed, & don’t had any extra bed with reason that the hotel doesn’t had a extra bed rervice...!?
During this time, I tried to made a call to Agoda but my call be trasfered to the auto answer machine.
 One of us must slept on the floor during a night without any repentance form the Mekong hotel...

reviews.title: Dirty
reviews.text: European breakfast really Asian breakfast and poor standard

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The hotel is only 4yrs old but in a terrible state. There has been water leakage in our room (818) so there was mould in the TV cabinet. We could not get hot water with the shower. The carpet was filthy that I thought I would pick up something! The only positive I have for this place is that the bed was comfortable!

reviews.title: Rất rất tệ
reviews.text: Nhân viên thái độ thiếu chuyên nghiệp vô cùng! Ko hề hỗ trợ khách, quản lý cũng thế

reviews.title: How many stars is this hotel ???
reviews.text: Have you seems the breakfast spreads? Only 2 fruit , No mushrooms or cheese for omelette and no response when asked for the manager. I asked 5 times to see the manager and they kept saying wait 1 minute. Also No porter or welcome water or drink  on arrival

reviews.title: First time at Mytho
reviews.text: Came early and wait unti 2pm even i know that there was not many visitors at that time (room should be available). Room seems had molding in 1 area on the wall.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Need improvement

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: They don't turn on AC in many area in the hotel. It took quite sometime for the room to come up with tolerable pleasant temperature. Most of the area and the room were carpeted. It smelled very humid. The room did not have shower stand and the shower ran really weak. It was not comfortable and pleasant vacation for me. I will not come back to this hotel  ever again.

reviews.title: Bathroom stinks
reviews.text: Good location and rather ok facilities, but the bathroom stinks and so I could not sleep for the whole night because of the bad smell from it… I informed the staff and they sprayed something but it didn’t help.

reviews.title: Dirty
reviews.text: On first impression hotel looks good but  once inside and closer inspection appears  it is rarely cleaned, great few from room but suspect windows have never been cleaned, carpets filthy, stains possibly blood splattered on the wall, bathroom shower no hook to hang shower head so you're holding with one hand trying to wash with the other, very large modern appearance but almost empty, staff unable to speak english,  lacking in all general cleanliness, very average breakfast mainly catering for vietnamese, area abundant in tropical fruit but all that was available was watermelon or dragon fruit, would not recomend

reviews.title: Big issues with mould/smell/cleanliness
reviews.text: I changed maybe 3 rooms as it was terrible smell - mixture of humidity, dirt, mould and heat... very bad ... if you have any airways issues - don't even consider this place. Place requires a deep vacuum cleaning starting carpets and finishing all soft furniture.  They have good idea of a bathroom but... due very old AC system all the steam are not collected so stays in the room and as outside is constantly 30-35C even you'll keep open windows- not much luck for any ventilation.  Staff members are quite helpful but hotel requires proper AC upgrade and full deep cleaning

reviews.title: Bad Upkeep of the hotel
reviews.text: The conditions of my room is old and badly needing upkeeps. Hot water bath is not hot or even warm. The main door latch had been broken and not fixed. Given 2 small bottles  of drinking water.

reviews.title: Not that grand
reviews.text: The hotel has as much atmosphere and  character as a airport departure lounge.  The  choice for breakfast was limited. The bedroom was tidy but poorly cleaned, carpet badly stained and in need of good wash as did other carpets in the hotel.

reviews.title: Personal Comments
reviews.text: Hotel room was nice, value for the money.  However, the breakfast was so so.

reviews.title: Bad Service
reviews.text: Room phone was broken, so every time I needed something/help, I had to walk down to the front desk to get help. The shower water was luke warm, too cold for shower. When asked for help, they said that the way to was, nothing they could do. When asked for an iron, they did have one for loan. The staff was not friendly and helpful in resolving the issues mentioned above.

reviews.title: ONE WORD: AVOID
reviews.text: Overall, I recommend all travelers to avoid this hotel because (1) they illegally hold onto your passport, (2) charge $ for old towels due to their wear and tear, and (3) the rooms’ bathrooms faucets were broken.

reviews.title: Hotel Assistant Manger
reviews.text:
Ms Ly, Assistant manger  was rude and not polite to me as a customer she was arrogant when questioned totally oblivious . I really do not understand why she is an assistant manager rather the solving mu issue she ignored and walked away and not have eye contact when spoken too. It seemed that she had left her brain at home and come to work if i mat be so blunt.
Moreover when asked to speak to General  Manager nobody had his contact detail ??? Very frustrating 3 days i was tere and repeatedly asked to speak to the GM , but to no avail. I rate it as 1 start hotel in this view.

reviews.title: Ants
reviews.text:
Maybe because of rainy season but they have an infestation of ants/termites. They were in and around the bed. I asked to change room but new room also had ants.
It still is the best hotel in My Tho but..

reviews.title: Not a real 4 star
reviews.text:
Pros: Clean. Nice rooms. 

Cons: Not much service. Room service finishes at 10pm. Food bad. Toilets got blocked. No hot water. Child got electrocuted on the dimmer of bedside table lamp. 

Not what you would expect from a four star hotel. But then again price was not 4 star. You get what you pay for

reviews.title: Hài lòng
reviews.text: Khách sạn cung cấp đủ dịch vụ như đơn đặt phòng đã xác nhận

reviews.title: NOT A 4* HOTEL
reviews.text: A BIT DISSAPOINTING, NEEDS A MAKEOVER. NO SWIMMING POOL. BREAKFAST SAD. BROKEN BATHROOM FITTINGS AND LAMP FITTINGS. not a 4 star hotel.

reviews.title: Nice location
reviews.text: Facilities are aging running down

reviews.title: Poor customer service
reviews.text: The location is great, the Hotel room was clean. But very poor customer service. The staffs not friendly at all. The wifi is very weak.  I would like to recommend Cuu Long Hotel. Give them a try.

reviews.title: In the center of the city
reviews.text: In My Tho it is one of the best hotels

reviews.title: Decent hotel but inexperienced staff, issues with cleanliness
reviews.text: This is a fairly nice hotel for My Tho with a good location close to town. However, we did not have the best experience. The first room that the hotel gave us had an extremely strong unpleasant smell. We requested a room change which the hotel gave us. The next room had ants. We informed the hotel and went out for dinner. By the time we had come back from dinner, the hotel staff told us they had sprayed the room but did not think to give us a new room. We were travelling with two young children (2 and 5 years old) and were not comfortable sleeping in a room that had been sprayed with Raid chemicals, not to mention that to air out the room they had opened the windows which meant mosquitoes were likely to have entered the room, and we found dead ants on the beds and a few still crawling around.  We finally requested another room change.  We think the staff tried their best but they all seemed really young and inexperienced.

reviews.title: Bad Bathtub Very Short Shower Head
reviews.text: Bad idea bathtub. Very inconvenient.

reviews.title: Nice hotel that didn't live up to expectation
reviews.text:
No AIR in hallways of hotel rooms just like a sauna.
Some rooms smelled like sewer.
Running out of breakfast at restaurant such as eggs, and yet we already paid for breakfast with room.
No one speaks English, hard to communicate.

reviews.title: Disappointing for a 4 star hotel
reviews.text: Disappointing for a 4 star hotel,  only looks like a four star  from the outside and in the lobby my room had no fridge, no tissue in room, shower water pressure is weak, missing nobs in cabinets and on window looks more like 3 star.  Service is substandard Not sure how it can be rated as four star something is odd here.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Room is smell, ants, cockroachs

reviews.title: khach san chat luong nhat tai My Tho
reviews.text: Hai long voi chat luong phong va cach phuc vu cua nhan vien khach san, tuy nhien, nhan vien can niem no hon va linh hoat giai quyet cac nhu cau cua khach tot hon. Se tiep tuc o khach san khi den My Tho lan sau.

reviews.title: Family’s Vacation
reviews.text:
The family room looked really nice with 5 separate beds even for mom & dad. The bathroom’s designed is really bad without the bath tub so the water are everywhere  in the bathroom when taking shower. You  have to manually using towers to drain water out to use the toilet & others & nothing the staffs can do to help.
My 2 girls got mosquitoes & other bugs bites so badly.  Other than that, the foods for breakfast are really good & staffs are very friendly.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Carpet, bathroom, elevator and other stuff etc should be clean. You guys have a great facility. You should mantain it as good and professional as possible. Breakfast should be served in various dishes.

reviews.title: It’s ok
reviews.text:
For what you’re paying it’s good but a few key things to note. 
Water pressure weak and only warm. To have a shower you almost need a ladder to step inside the bathtub. For those that have hair there was no hair dryer. The wifi was quite slow. Swimming pool….. forget it and the gym doesn’t exist anymore.  Beyond that the staff were friendly and the room was nice and clean. Comfy bed and amazing views.  Great location and a short walk to everything

reviews.title: Hotel looks old
reviews.text: Hotel probably needs refurbishment. Carpet and furniture looks very old. There were spider web all over the elevator doors. There was a quirky sound coming out from the room which continued the whole night.

reviews.title: Female Day Staff Not Friendly.
reviews.text: We had just cycled over 80 kilometers from our last hotel and arrived a little early.  We were hot and sweaty.  Although the hotel was pretty empty we were not allowed to check in until 2:00 even though they had clean rooms available.  She was not friendly or helpful and we felt as though we were an inconvenience to her.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Large, fairly comfortable hotel in a good location. However several annoying features. Mainly the swimming pool, which closes from 10:00 a.m. until 2:00 p.m. everyday, for some unknown reason. That happens to be the time I like to swim, when the weather gets hot. Also the hotel allows in unlimited numbers of nonguests from outside, even though the pool is not large. The result is extreme crowdedness, particularly during weekends and holidays, making the facility unusable for guests who want to relax or swim laps. There also used to be a fitness studio, which has closed for some reason. The hotel and the grounds are very nicely designed, unfortunately hotel management has policies and rules that limit guests' ability to enjoy the hotel's features.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: have suggestion about swimming pool operation time. better if can increase it, also jacuzzi inside bathroom is not working. Please improve those things

reviews.title: Perfect Location
reviews.text: This hotel is conveniently located to the waterways for tours and getaways. Its rooms are large, clean and a great view of the river if available. Included breakfast is also nice with local dishes. Although the front desk staff are nice and courteous it would be helpful if they know a bit more about the services and food highlights in My Tho.

reviews.title: Tạm được
reviews.text:
Phòng gym thì khóa cửa
Hồ bơi bị bong tróc, nước hồ bơi dơ. Nhân viên hồ bơi mang dẹp thọc chân xuống hồ
Cách âm không tốt
Vị trí ngày trung tâm

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Quite ok, worth to the price

I actually do enjoy staying here... However, it is not a true 4 star hotel... Sure they have the facilities but they have a total lack of making the stay perfect... Many things are broken, the terrace cafe on the roof is closed... The spa baths dont work... I have stayed there 2 times and both time lights were broken. ... The kettle was broken on my last stay... One lift was not working.... Things are in poor state of repair... HOWEVER!!!
I do like the place.. The beds are really comfortable. .... Breakfast is ok (Except the coffee)... The rooms are clean... and its a pretty good location for My Tho.. 
I just hope they set about fixing the little things... I will stay there again ..

reviews.title: poor facility of pool
reviews.text: the pool is almost outside of hotel, where you need to go down from your room to lobby, then get out of the hotel entrance ! then turn left and it's 10 meters away.

reviews.title: Everything look old.
reviews.text: Towels, faucets, table, carpet, pillows look old. The phone in the room is not connected.

reviews.title: Nice but not up to 4-star hotel
reviews.text: The location is excellent, the room is spacious but facilities were quite old and worn out. Buffet breakfast was nice.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The receptionist was very friendly. Very convenient for travel and dining. the view from the bedroom is very beautiful. can see the whole Mekong River. The bathtub is too high, the bath water flows out on to the floor .

reviews.title: KS tệ quá
reviews.text:
KS:
- Nước yếu và rất yếu
- Không giấy Vs
- Không máy sấy tóc
- Trang thiết bị xấu

reviews.title: Old Hotel
reviews.text: Have smell , gym closed, guests come check in 1 am super noisy actually hotel sell stay somehour

reviews.title: Waterfall
reviews.text:
The Rooms was very good in beginning but at night the Hotel started to flooded from the Rooftop to our floor by the rain outside. We have called for Front desk but it had no reaction and our floor was full wet the whole night.
the hotel’s system still needs to bring for guests the better for that price.

reviews.title: Mekong My Tho
reviews.text:
It's very nice for the price. We travel as a family and the room are very big and cozy. Although its carpet and furniture is a little out of date, we have no complaints with anything. 
Get yourself a room with the bridge and river view, you will enjoy it.
We will use Mekong My Tho again if we travel back to My Tho again

reviews.title: Acceptable!
reviews.text: The hotel is quite regular as other 3 star hotels. All is acceptable, despite the room looks a bit old. But I was really impressed with a security guard who is really friendly and careful of the guest.

reviews.title: Very poor wifi connection. Need stand near the door to receive signal
reviews.text:
Old hotel but well maintained. Big room. Poor wifi connection. 
Nice river view

reviews.title: Ghost hotel
reviews.text: Pretty empty… lights were off. Kitchen/ karaoke no longer services. Else, location is great.

reviews.title: Family vacation
reviews.text:
The hotel looks very new & nice from outside but the inside needs to be remodeled asap. 
I rented 2 families rooms at 2 different floors, but they were the same old, dirty sheets, leaking & flooding when taking showers. Ceilings are nails every where & moisture. Bath towels are old. You have to call housing services every day for towels.
Others than that, breakfast are very good., staffs are nice.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The housekeeping was bad , didnt clean the place properly . But the location is good.

reviews.title: Deceptive Flase advertisement
reviews.text: The room description on Agoda website said the the bathroom has Jacuzzi bathtub but the one in my room doesn't work. I called front desk and was informed that most if not all of the the Jacuzzi in the hotel don't anymore and the hotel has no intention of fixing them. Hope Agoda stop advertise the this hotel has in room Jacuzzi

reviews.title: Old hotel, staff not friendly.
reviews.text: An old-fashioned hotel, acceptable facilities, lacking many amenities. The pool is very small and the staff supervising the pool are particularly unpleasant. The reception is not friendly either. The breakfast has few options and the taste is mediocre. On the plus side, the location is very convenient, with decent dining options nearby close to the pier, and there are many decent cafes in the area.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Hotel reviews in Vietnam are 1s or 5s . The best or worst experience you will ever have.

Reading the reviews for Mekong hotel I was a bit apprehensive.

The hotel is a solid 3 star. It has seen better days and there is a bit of mold and worn carpets.

The rooms are large and doors and walls have good sound insulation. A lot of Vietnam hotel rooms are noisy.

The pool area is a bit neglected but the actual pools is fine.

Decent breakfast, pleasant front desk staff and good location

reviews.title: Good service and facilities
reviews.text: Hotel is in the center of My Tho city, it's convenience to go around. Some services inside hotel were close as gym, coffee. However the room has a great view, its clean and suitable

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Good location, great staffs but the room could use a deep clean.  Carpet and drapes were dirty.  The fridge didn't work. Room was musky at first but got better due to the AC.

reviews.title: Nice place
reviews.text: Good place to stay n value to money

reviews.title: Will need some improvements for the facilities.
reviews.text: It is a nice hotel, but the bathroom clearness and functions will need to improve. In the rooms of my and my friends, the water is not hot and the water volume is very small. Otherwise, it is pretty good hotel.

reviews.title: good hotel
reviews.text: good hotel

reviews.title: Good hotel recommended
reviews.text: Everything clean and fresh, only the shower design not so good to use

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel is very roomy. The place needs a lots of updates. Most of the stuff is out of date. From the reception to the rooms. The reception areas have  dirty sofas  and have some water drips from the ceilings. Most of the water drips spots have mold in it. I wouldn't recommend if you're looking a clean environment for your stay.

reviews.title: Dated but good
reviews.text: The hotel is dated but still nice. The roof top Cafe is not open. The staff friendly and helpful.

reviews.title: Traveler
reviews.text: Hotel is down graded but good maintenance.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: No internet connection

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: very good

reviews.title: Once was a jewel
reviews.text: You can tell this use to be a very nice place. Rooms were good size. Beds were comfortable. Wifi was good.  Had a fridge but when you left and took the key card (you had to insert to turn on electricity) the fridge and AC turns off, basically the whole rooms shuts off. The breakfast staff and food was good and had different selections each morning. The pool had missing tile that could cut someone's foot. Also they allow locals to use the pool if they pay to get in. So you can get a few rowdy teens in there. The fitness room was out of order, no bar or rooftop service. Again, I think this place use to be a top notch hotel but they need to invest in some repairs and upkeep. For the price it was good due to the breakfast, if not for that, I feelt there would be better choices.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: No complaints

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: No complaints

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: No complaints

reviews.title: Good price
reviews.text:
Good location.
The best hotel available in the town.

reviews.title: Dirty carpet throughout floor 6, in front of the elevator, hallway, and inside the room. It’s really, really dirty. Stepping in and out of the bathtub is dangerous as it was raised high from the floor
reviews.text: The front desk and house keeping staff were friendly and helpful. Breakfast was good with plenty of options every morning. Jacuzzi didn’t work. Dirty carpet on floor 6 needs to be replaced throughout. Stepping out from the elevator, I felt like walking on an active construction floor: dirty, dark, humid, bad smell. You can always see hair and/or litters on the carpet in the room everyday, even after room makeup. The cleaning team needs to improve their performance.

reviews.title: Hidden Gems
reviews.text: I stayed only one night. The hotel is too big in the area. It’s really nice viewing at night from the high floor. I didn’t use any facilities, because of short time. Hotel breakfast was good number of items and I specifically enjoyed yellow rice & eggs omelette with fruits.

reviews.title: Not worth as 4-star hotel
reviews.text:
The hotel is in a very nice location but the facility is quite old. Water in bathroom has bad smell. The room floor is covered with carpet and it caused the feeling of not clean.
Bfast was ok for local, but i was doubt it would be fine for foreigners.

reviews.title: Room smell
reviews.text: Good hotel and facilities, however, vent pile in toilet is very smelly. I think the hotel knew about it, therefore they put air purifier and perfumes. Only this thing is problem

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: Good place and location.

reviews.title: Good standard room
reviews.text: Car parking outside without proper shelter

reviews.title: good
reviews.text: good

reviews.title: good
reviews.text: good

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: I would recommend for business travellers as it’s a nice hotel, however for leisure travellers I would recommend staying in a local guesthouse for a more authentic experience

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Everything is ok, but internet is not good. Need to improve

reviews.title: Good to enjoy My Tho night
reviews.text: The hotel is good looking. Facility is good also. The location is very convenient for customers to walk around city.

reviews.title: Breakfast
reviews.text: Need many more dishes

reviews.title: Good place to stay
reviews.text: The hotel is good place to stay. The price is affordable. The location is convenient to explore My Tho city

reviews.title: Good place to stay in My Tho City
reviews.text: The hotel is good place to stay. The price is affordable. The location is convenient to explore My Tho city

reviews.title: Good place to stay
reviews.text: It is very good place to stay and explore My Tho city. THe hotel is good with the affordable room price. I would recommend people to stay there

reviews.title: Pretty good in a town with few options
reviews.text: The staff were nice and friendly and the lobby had a welcoming feel. The room was clean (except for a few wall markings), spacious and had all the usual things (eg mini fridge, tv etc).  There was hardly anyone staying so it had a bit of a ghostly feel, but that’s not anyone’s fault. The corridors were a bit shabby, but not terrible. We got room service. The food was edible, not amazing, but arrived quickly. The staff helped us to figure out how to get to Can Tho, which was great.

reviews.title: Holiday break
reviews.text: Mekong Hotel My Tho has always been our top choice when visiting My Tho due to its convenient location, spacious, clean, and airy rooms. Choose a river-view room for a beautiful view, friendly and charming staff, delicious breakfast that is clean and cooked to the authentic Southwestern flavor. We will return when we are back in My Tho.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Mekong My Tho Hotel is always our top choice when coming to My Tho because of its convenient location and clean, spacious rooms. Choose a river view room for a better view.

reviews.title: Big room. Good location. Need some work.
reviews.text: Spacious room. Great location with room looking out at the river. Sauna didn't work in my room. I would come back again

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
I’s a good and clean hotel , i had a problem with a bath in my room that was not working and they quickly changed me .
The only 2 thinks I would change is :
If you have a tennis court , at least have some tennis rackets to rent ao that people can play . I found that very strange not to have . 
And the second one is regarding the break fast. The coffe of the breakfast is very bad . I’s not a matter of a bartender doing the coffe but
I think even if it was filter coffe it wasn’t done with love. It was undrinkable.  To strong and sort of over sweet . Just made simple filter coffe and it will be fine

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The hotel is nice and in a prime location; however it looked a little outdated inside. Carpet is old and worn out. It should be replaced. The staff was wonderful. Overall, we still recommend the hotel for its staff and its great value for a 4-star status.

reviews.title: The staff
reviews.text:
The staff is the only reason this place got the rating it did. The hotel has been outdated for over 20 years.  The bathroom has a 2 ft step-in for the bath shower. Dangerous unsafe.
The staff is fantastic. I give them all the praise.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Great Location. The hotel seem old, but acceptable.

reviews.title: Hotel guests
reviews.text: Overall is good. Satisfied to all. Except the bathtub is too high and slippery.

reviews.title: Affordable accommodation with good value for money.
reviews.text: As of July 30, 2024, the outdoor swimming pool is in operation and well maintained, but the rooftop gym and bar are not in operation, so please consider this when staying. The breakfast buffet is at a normal level. The condition of the rooms is spacious and comfortable, but there is a peculiar smell which is a bit disappointing.

reviews.title: I am very satisfied with the price.
reviews.text:
Advantages: 
Coolness, breakfast, service response, great price

Disadvantages: 
No gym, spa not operating 
Hygiene condition of some parts of the pool

There are some disappointing aspects, but the price and breakfast service more than make up for it. I recommend it.

reviews.title: Nice n spacious rooms
reviews.text: Value for money and near river n boating

reviews.title: Good place to stay
reviews.text:
The hotel stays in a good location in My Tho which is really convenient for you to enjoy local food and tourist attraction around there. My wife really likes the room ( we got a deluxe room) cause it were clean and comfortable.
Tl;dr: Give it a try then you will like it same us.

reviews.title: It is quite good
reviews.text: Every thing is good except the bath room. There is too much hair on floor, the room is not really clean.

reviews.title: Top Hotel 👍🏻
reviews.text: A really great place to stay. We recommend. 👍

reviews.title: Valuable!
reviews.text: Location is good, nice view, near the Tien huge river. Room is spacious, clean.

reviews.title: Good service
reviews.text: Generally, this is one of the best hotels I have ever stayed in Vietnam. I highly recommend this hotel when you visit Mytho city. However, I hope that breakfast buffet will have more options for the customers.

reviews.title: Beautiful Hotel
reviews.text:
Fantastic Hotel with large Bedroom & very clean
Location was perfect for the Wharf
A few minor issues let it down on maintenance 
My fridge didn’t work, plus my colleague has to change their TV

reviews.title: Nice hotel, high C/P value
reviews.text: Nice hotel, high C/P value

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
+ Nice and big rooms
+ The rooftop bar
- the breakfast is not good, and depending the time there is not much left

reviews.title: Not suitable for weak knees
reviews.text: Very spacious room but no walking shower. The bathtub is too high for anyone with weak knees, knees replacements, short legs to get in and out of the tub when taking showers.  However the location is very good and the staff members are friendly.

reviews.title: Mekong MyTho hotel
reviews.text: Very roomy, quite, friendly staff. While the room is clean, facility shows some ages - need maintenance. Did not provide adequate towels - only 2 a day for a couple.

reviews.title: Hotel Vacation Guests
reviews.text: Satisfied to all  😁

reviews.title: Thank you.
reviews.text: The place was ok, reasonably priced at 25usd. What made it exceptional was the service provided by Le Quoc Huy. He went out of his way to make sure I was able to get a transfer to Can Tho. I am very thankful for his excellent work.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: good location, new facilities, probably best hotel in town

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
For us was little bit sad that for example the Bar at the rooftop was closed. But we understand if there are no guests so the don’t spend the time to open the bar without any guests.
Hotel was very good only we found no hairdryer. 
Thanks for the friendly welcome

reviews.title: One of the good hotels in My Tho.
reviews.text:
Things I am satisfied with:
+ The location is very convenient for travel and dining.
+ The pool is decent, but the hydraulic water system is not functioning.
+ The room is clean, has a nice view, and features a very nice jacuzzi.
+ The air conditioning and internet are quite good.
+ The hotel café prices are very reasonable: 20k.
Things I am not satisfied with:
+ A deposit of 500k is required upon arrival.
+ The breakfast has only a few items, and you can only have beef noodle soup and a cup of coffee (considered acceptable for the price).

reviews.title: Good price for big room and view
reviews.text: Very good Location ,room spaces,bed comfortable.everything is excellent except carpet has stains make hotel look dirty

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: Great place to stay in My Tho
reviews.text: Good value and very comfortable. The breakfast was like a 3 star hotel. They should have really hot “hot food” not warm, less oil on the food and a better variety of recipes for egg cooking, such as omelette with ingredients, rather than just “sunny side up”.

reviews.title: Great but for 1 thing
reviews.text:
Pros - bed very comfortable.  Breakfast is amazing!  
Cons- main disappointment- staff at the restaurant on the top floor tried to cheat me out of my money.  My meal was $200k, so I gave them $500k. Changed back $300k and I asked if they can break it into smaller change.  Came back with only $100k in change.  I kept counting the money to be sure.  Went up to the SAME waitress "I gave you $300k to break why did you only return $100? Her answer "I thought you were paying the bill". HUH? This is the SAME waitress that served me the bill and returned my change.  I was so mad.  Just because I am a foreigner does not mean that I am naive about money. 
Another CON - bathroom had a little mold in the corner of the bathroom,  which didn't really bother me much, but wanted to mention. Hallways hot, room cool, except at night the AC gets turned down - would wake up sweating somewhat.   Would definitely stay here again though because of the bed and breakfast!

reviews.title: Amazing Hotel
reviews.text:
It’s the best hotel in My Tho. Why not book it? 

Had my wedding here and stayed in the suite. It was absolutely enormous compared to most hotels’ suites. My family and friends stayed in the deluxe doubles which were very big as well. 

Everything head to toe was awesome. I wish the cocktail and coffee bar on the roof was open later. Staff was great. Thanks!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
The hotel was beyond our expectation. The overall experience was fantastic.
The room was new and clean with nice view. The food was decent. The service was good. The location was good, My Tho was a small city anyway.
Highly recommended.

The lighting in the rooftop restaurant needs improving; the waitress had to use a torch to illuminate the menu. Strange eating in semi-darkness.

reviews.title: Short trip
reviews.text:
The hotel rated 4-star level which satisfied basically our demands: large free parking accesible to the city center; clean room with high-speed Wi-fi; breakfast including local dishes but contain less recipes to choose (only 2-3 regional dishes and 2 western-style meals). 
The staff is quite nice and generous.

reviews.title: It is a clean and comfortable place to rest.
reviews.text: It's great for visiting the four islands. It was very convenient since it was near the ferry terminal, and it was more luxurious and quieter than I expected. The pool was in operation, but it's a bit disappointing that the gym was not.

reviews.title: I recommend it.
reviews.text: The hygiene condition is good. It was nice to have a lake nearby for walking. This is my third visit, and there isn't a place like this in the My Tho area. You shouldn't expect much from breakfast, but it's sufficient for a simple meal. The staff are friendly, and the elevator is fast, which is nice.

reviews.title: This is a gem!

The breakfast buffet has very few items but includes a delicious noodle dish. The hotel is not as new and luxurious as other 4-5 star hotels, but it provides a sufficiently complete experience. The bathtub needs to be upgraded.

reviews.title: Good experience
reviews.text: The staff is extremely friendly, attentive, and the check-in process is quick and efficient. The rooms are new and beautiful. The decor looks very luxurious. The view of the river is especially beautiful, and it is convenient to get around. I really like it. I will definitely stop by again when I have the chance to visit My Tho.

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: This hotel is in a Great location. Staff are friendly and room is cleaned. My only issue is the carpet inside the room. Wish it was hardwood flooor

reviews.title: Everything is satisfactory.
reviews.text: I can't believe such a good hotel is available at this price; I am very satisfied. It's quiet enough that I would want to stay for a week, and there are plenty of food options nearby. When going to Ho Chi Minh, I can use the free shuttle service to the terminal (5 minutes away), and it only takes 2 hours to get there by bus directly.

reviews.title: Should stay even just once.
reviews.text:
- The hotel is very spacious, with a tennis court and an outdoor swimming pool.
- I booked a deluxe double room, which is very large, located on the 8th floor with a beautiful view.
- I don't know what the other rooms are like, but the room I stayed in seemed a bit outdated in terms of interior, and the door was very hard to open and close; it required a lot of force to operate.
- The TV is a bit small, and the refrigerator is moderately cool, not very cold.
- The breakfast buffet didn't have anything special, just a few dishes like: fried rice, stir-fried vegetables, soup that was somewhat sweet, a bit oily braised chicken, steamed rice cakes, Vietnamese pork sausage, mixed salad, fruits, bánh mì with jam, tea, coffee, bottled orange juice, and bottled water.
- Besides the buffet, everything else is quite good; you should try staying here at least once.

reviews.title: Very big room and nice water view.
reviews.text: We love to stay here but wifi signal wasn’t not strong enough.

reviews.title: Worth experiencing.
reviews.text: In My Tho, there aren't many 4-star hotels like Mekong, and since the group has young children, our team decided to stay here. It was truly beyond our expectations with a very reasonable price. The room was clean and had a bathtub. The location is easy to find with a beautiful view, and the staff is enthusiastic and helpful. We should stay here when we have a chance to visit My Tho and need to stay for a night. Thank you, Mekong.

reviews.title: Lonely Westerner
reviews.text: I think I was the only Westerner in My Tho and only stayed one night but the hotel had everything you need. It was very under occupied so while the service was very good some facilities like the pool were unavailable. Breakfast was tuned to Asians with very limited choices for other nationalities. The carpet in my room and the adjacent corridor/lift area is beyond it's "use by" date and needs renewing.

reviews.title: "Évasion Pittoresque au Cœur du Mékong : Confort Spacieux et Accueil Chaleureux"
reviews.text: Lors de mon séjour, j'ai eu le plaisir de découvrir un hôtel offrant des chambres spacieuses, dotées d'une vue magnifique sur le Mékong. Cet aspect a grandement contribué à rendre mon expérience inoubliable, me permettant de profiter de panoramas à couper le souffle dès le réveil. L'accueil et le service fournis par le personnel étaient exceptionnels. Chaque membre de l'équipe s'est montré extrêmement attentif, efficace et chaleureux, ajoutant une touche personnelle à l'ensemble de mon séjour. L'excellence de leur service et la qualité des installations font de cet hôtel un choix incontournable pour quiconque souhaite découvrir la région tout en bénéficiant d'un confort et d'un accueil de haut niveau. Je recommande vivement cet établissement pour une expérience mémorable.

reviews.title: Kurzurlaub

Wir mussten notgedrungen in dieses Hotel, hätten wir eine andere Möglichkeit gehabt, wären wir nicht dort hin gegangen. Preis-Leistung nicht ok!

reviews.text: Das Hotel liegt nicht direkt im Zentrum der Stadt, trotzdem kann man  etwa 15 Minuten zu Fuß  das Zentrum der Stadt erreichen.

reviews.title: Schöne Aussicht-stinkender Teppich
reviews.text:

Hotel liegt sehr nahe von der Ablegestelle zu den Inseln. Und zum Essen gehen und einkaufen ist alles fussläufig zu erreichen

reviews.title: Grosszüge Zimmer viel Platz
reviews.text:
Wir schätzen die grosszügigen Räume mit toller Aussicht auf den Park/City und oben über die ganze Stadt. Es gibt Details, wo offenbar Nicht verändert wird, wie z.B. zu grosser neuer Kühlschrank, der nicht in den Schrank passt und dann ist der Schrank immer 5cm OFFEN (2x daran gestossen). Dusche ist mit 3 Knöpfen (die nicht bezeichnet sind) sehr kompliziert zu bedienen. 
- Frühstück:  die Butter war an keinem einzigen Tag gekühlt!  das würde ich von einem 4 Sterne Hotel erwarten!  Das Personal muss besser geschult werden oder der Manager/Foodsafety muss einen Kurs/Schule machen. 
- Jogert fehlt definitiv beim Frühstück
- Die Tostermaschine müsste mal so richtig gereinigt oder komplett ersetzt werde.  Funktioniert nicht mehr richtig und ist dreckig. 
- das ja Vietnam franzölschen Einfluss hat, müsste der Omeletten Koch auch eine Gabel für das EI schlagen nehmen, ich habe 2x eine Gabel gegeben, aber am 3. Tag hat er wieder einen Holzlöffel genommen ;-( Schade  / ich glaube ich muss mal meinen Viet-Friend aus Saigon vorbeischicken und viele Tricks zeigen..   Dieses Hotel hat eigentlich extrem viel Potential, aber irgendwie müsste das das Management besser checken und neu organisieren.  Wir kommen wieder und dann wäre es schön Veränderungen zu spühren.

reviews.title: Zentral
reviews.text:
Pool war super, aber ein wenig trüb 
Lage war top
Guter Ausgangspunkt  und zentral gelegen

reviews.title: Wohlfühlhotel in sehr schöner Umgebung
reviews.text: Perfekt für Ausflüge im Mekong, alle Ziele zu Fuß erreichbar, großes Zimmer mit Flussblick, Möbel und Bad in die Jahre gekommen, Duschen in der hohen und rutschigen Wanne etwas schwierig, Personal super nett und hilfsbereit, sehr vielseitiges asiatisches Frühstück.

reviews.title: Überraschend gutes Hotel
reviews.text: Das MEKONG My Tho Hotel ist nicht unbedingt ein Urlauber-Hotel, da die Urlauber in dieser Stadt für eine eintages Mekong-Delta Tour aus Hanoi anreisen (Tagestouren). Daher sind meist Geschäftstleute und vereinzelt Urlauber im Hotel. Das Hotel ist sehr groß mit einem Restaurant im obersten Stockwerk und einem netten, sauberen Poll direkt am Hotel. Die Zimmer und Gänge haben einen Teppichboden und haben trotz intensiver Reinigung einen leichten Geschmack. Die Hotelzimmer sind wirklich gut eingerichtet, ein großes Bad und ausreichend Möbel. Wir hatten unser Zimmer im 7. Stockwerk und daher mußten wir das Wasser im Bad meistens 5 Minuten laufen lassen, bis es halbwegs warm wurde. Das Preis - Leistungsverhältnis ist sehr gut. Die Damen bei der Rezeption waren uns bei verschiedensten organisatorischen Aktionen hilfsbereit und wirklich freundlich. Das Frühstück ist nett aufbereitet, allerdings sind die Speisen nicht westlich orientiert.

reviews.title: Hervorragendes Hotel
reviews.text:
Eines der besten Hotels während unserer 4 wöchigen Reise durch Vietnam. Super Lage! Riesige Zimmer - wir hatten einen super Ausblick. Das Personal vor allem an der Rezeption ausserordentlich bemüht und hilfsbereit bei allen unsren Fragen; besonderen Dank noch einmal an Herrn Huy! 
Moped empfehlenswert:
WhatsApp: +84 90 733 82 02.

reviews.title: Tolles Hotel in guter Lage
reviews.text: Das vier Sterne Hotel bietet alles was das Herz begehrt. Erstklassige Ausstattung mit Restaurant auf dem Dach und Pool neben dem Hotel. Die klimatisierten Zimmer sind sehr groß und die Betten gemütlich. Das Frühstücks-Buffet bietet typisch vietnamesische Küche und europäische. Sehr lecker! Die Umgebung ließ sich super von dort aus erkundigen. Shuttle werden auch vom Hotelpersonal organisiert. Für das Doppelzimmer pro Nacht haben wir ca. 45€ gezahlt. Definitiv weiter zu empfehlen!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Location is good. Yet hotel is not well maintained. The rooms smelled  like fungi, which is not strange given the mold was wide spread in our bedroom ceiling, the bath was not cleaned and covered in body fat from previous guests and the bed sheets were not clean. Also the minibar dissapeared yet they made us pay for usage of waterbottles that were labeled as complimentary near the bed.

reviews.title: 部屋が汚ない
reviews.text: 部屋に入るとじゅうたんの上にゴミだらけ。冷蔵庫内はカビがあり臭くて使用できず。シャワールームの床には他人の髪の毛のまとまったものがあり。もう二度と泊まりません。

reviews.title: お湯が出ない
reviews.text: お湯が出ませんでした。冷蔵庫がない場合があります。

reviews.title: リバービューの眺めは良かったです。
reviews.text: デラックスダブルのリーバｰビューの部屋でした。お部屋、ベットは広く、バスタブ有りで温水が出ます。（蛇口が三つあり最初はぬるいお湯が出てましたが色々いじっていたら熱いお湯が出ました。）安心・普通なホテルです。（ベトナムのホテルでは普通って事が一番です。こんなものか・・・と思うこと、これはないよ～っと思うことが多いベトナムで普通って事はお勧めです。）お値段的にも設備的にも普通です。安心です。朝食はこのクラスのホテルでは当たり前の朝食です。喫煙者にはテラスがありますよ。朝食後の一服はテラスでコーヒー飲みながら出来ますよ。最上階にはカフェ・バーがあります。店員、お客ともだらっと時間を過ごしています。塀と植木が高いので座ると空しかみえません。おしゃべりして長居する人は良いですね。

reviews.title: まぁまぁ良いホテルです。

朝食はいまいちですが、フルーツは美味しいです。

reviews.text:
隔音很差，房間沒有很乾淨
早餐環境很像在菜市場吃，很吵
實在不符合4星級
怕吵的真的不建議住這

reviews.title: 地點好, 房間大
reviews.text: 常來入住, 房間大視野好.

reviews.title: 가격 대비 불만족
reviews.text: 직원 교육도 안되어 있고 부대시설도 미흡함

reviews.title: 직원들 태도가 마음에 안듬!
reviews.text:
직원들이 손님을 봐도 모른체하고
호텔을 통해 오토바이 렌탈 했는데 
오토바이가 완전구식이라 브레이크 와이어가
다 마모되어 브레이크 손잡이에서 빠진건데
내가 고장 냈다고 청구하는 어이 없는 직원들...
손님의 안전은 생각도 안하구... 
참 생각없는 직원들!!!

reviews.title: 메콩
reviews.text: 편의 시설은 부족하나, 나름 가격대비 괜찮은 호텔 입니다.

reviews.title: 보통
reviews.text: 보통

reviews.title: 대체로 만족스러움
reviews.text:
숙소 깨끗함
직원 친절
저렴한 가격

reviews.title: 아쉬운 시설
reviews.text: 피트니스 없음, 욕실 낮은 수압

reviews.title: 샤워 시설 불편함, 피트니스룸 폐쇄, 냉장고 불편
reviews.text: 샤워실이 따로 없고 욕조에서 샤워기를 이용해야 한다. 샤워호스의 길이가 짧아서 구부정하거나 욕조에 앉아서 샤워를 해야 하는 점이 가장 불편하다. 샴푸병은 예쁘나 미끄럽고 깨지기 쉬워 주의해야 한다. 깨뜨리면 200,000동을 지불해야 한다. 숙소 냉장고는 시원하지 않고 온도조절도 되지 않는 냉장고가 있다. 피트니스센터는 문을 닫고 운영하지 않는다.

reviews.title: 기대치이하 실망
reviews.text:
아고다 예약시 표기되는 위치 지도보기가 CAI BE로되어있어서 예약했다가 비싼돈내고 차량이용해서 MY THO로 돌아왔고...아고다쪽은 전화도안되고~~~으..
결재도 카드예약했는데 호텔쪽 기기불통으로 비상금 탈탈털어서 현금결재로 만들고~~~으...
아이들 놀만한 수영장은 마음에 들었다...~~^^.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
직윈 서비스 및 아침식사는 만족한 편입니다
그러나 피트니스센터 운영이 안되고 있고
점심 저녁식사도 운영을 하나 메뉴 종류 
포함하여 좀 불편한 것 같습니다

reviews.title: 편히 쉬었다 왔습니다.
reviews.text: 위치 편히 쉬기 좋은 호텔 입니다.

reviews.title: 가격대비 만족!!
reviews.text:
가격 생각하면 무조건 여기 묶어야함
다만 위생이 좀 아쉬움

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: 미토 중심에 있어 좋았습니다. 깨끗하고 넓고요 다만 아침식사가 부실해요. 그리고 여권을 맡기든지 보증금2백만동을 내라고 합니다.

reviews.title: 가성비 좋음
reviews.text: 시내  입구에 위치해 있어서 주변 관광하기 좋음

reviews.title: 가성비 굿
reviews.text:
숙소는 위치 및 가성비 너무 좋습니다
숙소는 청결하며 미토 시내에 위치해있습니다~다만 메콩강 말도는 주변 즐길거리가 없는게 조금 아쉽습니다

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: 差

reviews.title: Not recommend!!!
reviews.text: Stayed a few times for biz trip. EVERYTIME NO HOT WATER TO TAKE SHOWER!!! I told front desk about this, front desk said they received many customers complaining the same problem, but they just don't solve this!!! And the water is toooo small to take shower!!! Very very bad facility and apparently their management team doesn't care about customers stay feeling at all!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 不错

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 旁边就是湄公河，不错的酒店，旁边有个小店炒饭很好吃

reviews.title: 很棒
reviews.text: 性价比高，位置很好，在房间里就可以看到湄公河，距离码头也很近，早餐丰盛，推荐
